{{Infobox character
| name = Sages
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sages]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]]
}}

''See also: [[Sages Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Sages represent a significant stage of advancement in power, following the rank of [[Archlord]]. They achieve this status by establishing a connection to an [[Icon]], which is a symbol representing a greater concept of reality. This process requires intense willpower training and a deep understanding of one's [[madra]]. Unlike [[Heralds]], who focus their power inwardly to enhance themselves, Sages project their willpower outward to directly influence and change the world around them. While they possess unique authority through their specific relationship with their [[Icon]], they are generally considered less physically durable than [[Heralds]]. Sages often carry an air of authority and poise, appearing much older internally than they do physically. Many Sages are known by titles related to their [[Icons]] rather than their names, such as the [[Winter Sage]] or the [[Sage]] of the [[Frozen Blade]]. Because their training involves embodying a specific concept, Sages typically do not take apprentices, as any student would merely become a weaker imitation of the master. In terms of social standing, Sages hold high rank and are often granted the freedom to move independently, though they may still be subject to certain oaths or responsibilities as they progress in their advancement.}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Two [[Sages]] dropped their veils.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sages]] learn to control miracles.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sages]] were questioning [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Sages]] focus their willpower outside of themselves to make changes to the world directly.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Sages]] are beings that can potentially help against [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Infusing techniques with willpower is not the exclusive domain of [[Sages]] and [[Heralds]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Sages]] are peers to [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Sages]] are those who embody a concept.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sages]] are powerful entities that require willpower to fight.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|There were three [[Sages]] present.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
